cases.title: Edge states and topological invariants of non-Hermitian systems
cases.topic: Non-Hermitian SSH model and non-Bloch bulk-boundary correspondence

preprint.title: Edge states and topological invariants of non-Hermitian systems

publication.title: Edge States and Topological Invariants of Non-Hermitian Systems

cases.summary: Reproduces the open-boundary spectrum, generalized Brillouin zone, skin profiles, non-Bloch winding, and the nonzero-t3 extension.
cases.limitation: Author plotting data are unavailable; digitized source references were used internally for validation but are not redistributed.

featured_results.result: Beta roots, generalized Brillouin zone, and skin profiles
Paper-parameter nonzero-t3 spectrum, winding, and noncircular GBZ

cases.title: Non-Hermitian Chern bands
cases.topic: Non-Hermitian Chern bands and non-Bloch Chern physics
cases.summary: Reproduces open-boundary and cylinder phase structure, square dynamics, complex spectra, and finite-size checks.
cases.limitation: Some phase-boundary and panel-level comparisons remain paper-subset or source-table validations rather than full independent finite-size reruns.

cases.title: Tackling the Qubit Mapping Problem for NISQ-Era Quantum Devices

preprint.title: Tackling the Qubit Mapping Problem for NISQ-Era Quantum Devices

publication.title: Tackling the Qubit Mapping Problem for NISQ-Era Quantum Devices

cases.summary: Reconstructs the SABRE routing pipeline, swap trace, reverse traversal, decay trade-off, and all 26 rows of Table II. Row-exact optimized values remain limited by unpublished run metadata.
cases.limitation: All 26 Table II rows run and produce hardware-compliant routes, but row-exact optimized values require the paper's unpublished random seeds, tie-breaking order, and BKA post-processing inputs. This is a metadata boundary, not a compute boundary.

cases.title: Discrete time crystals: rigidity, criticality, and realizations
cases.topic: Floquet many-body dynamics and discrete time crystals

preprint.title: Discrete time crystals: rigidity, criticality, and realizations

publication.title: Discrete Time Crystals: Rigidity, Criticality, and Realizations

cases.summary: Reproduces subharmonic rigidity, level statistics, variance, long-range variance, and mutual-information features with exact local evolution.
cases.limitation: The published medium campaign aggregates 168 jobs into 55 paper-parameter points at L=8,10,12. The final L=8,10,12,14 high-statistics campaign was not launched; optional L=16,18 also require a memory-aware eigensolver.

cases.title: Quantum many-body scars
cases.topic: PXP dynamics and quantum many-body scars

publication.title: Weak ergodicity breaking from quantum many-body scars

cases.summary: Reproduces constrained Hilbert-space structure, scar overlaps, revivals, participation ratios, and symmetry-resolved level statistics.
cases.limitation: The paper's k=0, I=+1 sector is reproduced at L=28 (dimension 13201), including the 15-state scar tower. L=32 is not launched because one float64 dense matrix is already about 47 GB before eigensolver workspace on the current 40 GB A100 path; thermodynamic-limit iTEBD also remains unimplemented.

cases.title: Simulating the Sycamore quantum supremacy circuits

preprint.title: Simulating the Sycamore quantum supremacy circuits

publication.title: Simulation of Quantum Circuits Using the Big-Batch Tensor Network Method

cases.summary: Reproduces batch-probability, post-selection XEB, conditional-probability, and complexity-table features.
cases.limitation: The exact 53-qubit contraction is not launched: the paper reports 4.51e18 head-contraction operations and 149 days on one A100, while a direct complex128 statevector would require 128 PiB. The public case also lacks the original circuit, contraction path, slicing configuration, and validation-amplitude bundle.

cases.title: Efficient simulation of logical magic state preparation protocols

preprint.title: Efficient simulation of logical magic state preparation protocols

publication.title: Efficient Simulation of Logical Magic State Preparation Protocols

cases.summary: Reconstructs the exact Steane [[7,1,3]] logical-H circuit and evaluates acceptance, logical infidelity, runtime, and sampling precision.
cases.limitation: Exact-circuit acceptance matches all 12 validated points, while mid-range logical infidelity remains 0.42-0.68x of the paper curve because the panel-(c) gate/idle schedule is reconstructed and the author implementation is unavailable. Runtime remains proxy timing; digitized source point sets are not redistributed.
cases.full_run_note: The paper profile evaluates all 12 physical-error points with the larger Monte Carlo shot budget used by the published case output.

cases.title: An Algorithm for Fast Assembling Large-Scale Defect-Free Atom Arrays

preprint.title: An Algorithm for Fast Assembling Large-Scale Defect-Free Atom Arrays

cases.summary: Reproduces paper-geometry path-planning probes, paper-scale P2WGS continuity, and a pipelined timing model for atom-array assembly.
cases.limitation: The case includes an A100-SXM4-80GB 127x127 to 101x101 geometry probe and paper-scale P2WGS at N=10201. Full million-sample GNN training was stopped after the strict metric-contract gate failed; the unavailable GPU-parallel auction kernel is not replaced by CPU timing claims.

cases.title: Boson Sampling as a Probe of Chaotic and Integrable Quantum Dynamics

preprint.title: Boson Sampling as a Probe of Chaotic and Integrable Quantum Dynamics in a Photonic Chip

cases.summary: Reproduces Porter-Thomas distance, entropy, spectral-form-factor, OTOC, participation-ratio, and scaling features.
cases.limitation: Several figures use paper-parameter subsets or local random-matrix instances rather than the full experimental setting.

cases.title: Sensitivity to perturbations in the three-dimensional Anderson model

preprint.title: Sensitivity to perturbations in the three-dimensional Anderson model

cases.summary: Reproduces disorder sensitivity, gap-ratio, IPR, susceptibility separation, and phenomenological strong-disorder trends, including an A100 campaign at L=24,28,31 with 605 disorder realizations.
cases.limitation: The paper's L=32-38 targets were not forced through the current dense eigensolver: L=32 hit a 32-bit workspace failure and L=38 exceeds the practical single-A100 memory path. The T and randomized-site n operator panels remain outside the completed subset and are not replaced by proxy data.

cases.title: Lyapunov formulation of band theory for disordered non-Hermitian systems
cases.topic: Lyapunov band theory and the non-Hermitian skin–Anderson transition

preprint.title: Lyapunov formulation of band theory for disordered non-Hermitian systems

publication.title: Universal Thouless relations for disordered non–Hermitian systems in one dimension
publication.citation: Science Bulletin (2026), online ahead of print

cases.summary: Reproduces Figs. 3–5 with an L=1000, 3200-realization spectral ensemble, Lyapunov grids, state profiles, winding sectors, and the W_c=2.1 transition.
cases.limitation: Author seeds, state-selection windows, transfer/grid details, and final artwork are unavailable; all scientific gates pass, but source-pixel identity is not claimed. This is an author-protocol boundary, not a compute boundary, so no further large campaign is scheduled.
cases.full_run_note: The full L=1000, 3200-realization rerun is resumable but computationally expensive; the quick commands regenerate figures and scientific checks from the published generated data.

featured_results.result: OBC spectral density, state profiles, mobility edge, and scaling
PBC spectral density and winding sectors
Mobility-contour shrinkage and the skin–Anderson transition

cases.title: Buffer-atom-mediated quantum logic gates with off-resonant modulated driving
cases.topic: Buffer-atom-mediated Rydberg CZ, dual-pulse Doppler upgrade, and amplitude-ratio robustness via off-resonant modulated driving

publication.title: Buffer-atom-mediated quantum logic gates with off-resonant modulated driving

cases.summary: Reproduces the buffer-atom-mediated CZ gate from an independent three-body Rydberg Hamiltonian: single-photon waveforms, populations, and phases (Fig. 3, complete, gate error < 1e-4), the two-photon protocol (Fig. 4), the Doppler-insensitive dual-pulse upgrade (Fig. 5), and the amplitude-ratio robustness map (Fig. 7).
cases.limitation: The two-photon full three-level model gives gate error ~1e-3 vs the paper's <1e-4 (its waveforms were likely optimised in a reduced/effective model); Fig. 7 peak ~25% below the paper; Fig. 6 three-qubit Toffoli geometry is underspecified and not reproduced; Figs. a6-a8 have no published coefficients.
cases.full_run_note: All figures run on a laptop CPU (Fig. 3 in seconds; Fig. 4/5 ~1 min; Fig. 7 a few min across cores). No GPU or cluster needed.
